raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 1930 aims to protect students from changes in admission requirement policies at California State University and University of California.",
    "The proposed expansion of admission requirements by California State University includes additional coursework in quantitative reasoning.",
    "Changes to admissions requirements should be vetted through studies to determine their impact on students.",
    "Changing admissions requirements may disproportionately affect students of color, creating additional barriers to education.",
    "AB 1930 mandates that any change in student eligibility policy requirements must involve coordination between California State University and University of California.",
    "An independent third-party research organization must assess whether changes in student eligibility policies would have a disparate impact on underrepresented student groups."
  ]
}
```
